# workbench_group (Resource)

Workbench provisioned group resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "workbench_group" "my_group" {
  group_name                  = "my-group"
  organization_user_facing_id = "my-org"
  require_grant_reason        = false
  description                 = "terraform managed group"
}

output "my_group" {
  value = workbench_group.my_group
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `group_name` (String) Workbench managed group name
- `organization_user_facing_id` (String) Workbench group organization user facing ID

### Optional

- `description` (String) Workbench group description
- `expiration_days` (Number) Workbench group expiration days
- `expiration_notification` (Boolean) Workbench group expiration notification
- `organization_id` (String) Workbench group organization ID
- `require_grant_reason` (Boolean) Workbench group require grant reason
- `sync_group` (Boolean) Workbench group sync group

### Read-Only

- `created_by` (String) Workbench group created by
- `created_date` (String) Workbench group created date
- `group_email` (String) Workbench group email
- `internal_name` (String) Workbench group internal name
- `last_updated_by` (String) Workbench group last updated by
- `last_updated_date` (String) Workbench group last updated date
